creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks for the vuxml entry, is very appreciated! A minor thing: >>> Successful. Checking if tidy differs... ... seems okay Checking for space/tab... --- /data/fernape_data/FreeBSD-repos/ports/security/vuxml/vuln-flat.xml 2023-07-05 13:33:08.077976000 +0200 +++ /data/fernape_data/FreeBSD-repos/ports/security/vuxml/vuln.xml.unexpanded 2023-07-05 13:33:11.862756000 +0200 @@ -91,7 +91,7 @@

The Gitea team reports:

-

If redirect_to parameter has set value starting with +

If redirect_to parameter has set value starting with \\example.com redirect will be created with header Location: /\\example.com that will redirect to example.com domain.

... see above there was an extra space after "with". Always run "make validate" from security/vuxml. No need to update a new patch!
